sourceMovie.title: Uncharted
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Uncharted works as a action movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The action and adventure blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Pirates of the Caribbean: The Curse of the Black Pearl
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Uncharted clicked for you, Pirates of the Caribbean: The Curse of the Black Pearl (2003) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and adventure, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: Pirates of the Caribbean: Dead Men Tell No Tales

faq.question: What should I watch after Uncharted?
faq.answer: Try Pirates of the Caribbean: The Curse of the Black Pearl, Pirates of the Caribbean: Dead Men Tell No Tales, Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom—each shares DNA with Uncharted while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Uncharted?
faq.answer: Uncharted (2022) is best described as Action, Adventure. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Uncharted part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "Uncharted Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
